tweet_text: 🚨 Wales face heartbreak again as Bosnia and Herzegovina win 4-2 on penalties, ending their World Cup dreams in Cardiff. Edin Dzeko's equalizer sent the match to shootouts. 💔⚽ #WorldCup2026 #WalesFootball
article_title: Wales agony as Bosnia and Herzegovina win penalty shootout to end World Cup hopes

tweet_text: 🚨 Heartbreak for Ireland as they fall to the Czech Republic in a World Cup playoff semi-final after a dramatic shootout! Ireland led 2-0 but lost 5-4 on penalties, missing out on their first World Cup in 24 years. 😢⚽️ #WorldCup2026 #CzechRepublic
article_title: Ireland dreams end in shootout heartbreak after Krejci’s late goal rescues Czechs

tweet_text: 🚨 Italy advances to the World Cup playoff final after defeating Northern Ireland, thanks to goals from Tonali and Kean! 🇮🇹 Next up: a crucial clash against Bosnia and Herzegovina. #WorldCup #ItalyFootball
article_title: Tonali and Kean end Northern Ireland World Cup hopes to send Italy into playoff final
